snippet.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
snippet.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

snippet.title: HUH!! Bisa Membelah LAUTAN & Cari Brainrot Terlangka 🌊🥶🌊 | Open Sea For Brainrots Indonesia
snippet.description:
HUH!! Bisa Membelah LAUTAN & Cari Brainrot Terlangka 🌊🥶🌊 | Open Sea For Brainrots Indonesia

Nama Game : Open Sea For Brainrots
Link Game : https://www.roblox.com/games/114349086251135

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁
✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

🔰 Bang, CARA JOIN gimana ya?
Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox

snippet.title: Nresnani - La Tasya Feat. Tadeus Lavora (HIPHOP DANGDUT VERSION)
snippet.description:
Title: Nresnani
Voc : La Tasya Feat. Tadeus Lavora
Cipt : Tadeus Waseso
====================
Executive Producer : Barkot Production
====================

♫ Lirik - (Nresnani) ♫
Sumilir angin wengi ngobati laraku
Bebarengan sliramu ngiasi atiku
Nyamanku mung ro kowe
Ora ono liyane
Sayangku aku tresno sliramu

Duh sayang tresnoku iki ora bakal ilang
Janji setyo ku wingi aku Iseh kelingan
Koyo langit rembulan
Bakal tansah sesandingan
Tresnoku lan tresnomu bakal terus bersatu

Maturnuwun pun tansah mayungi, pas udane teko
Ora ono sing iso ganteni, kowe sing tak tresno

Roso sayang iki rabakal luntur sak enteke umur
Kowe rasah sumelang, sayang

Genggemen tangan iki, 
Percoyo sliramu mung siji
Dongaku ora bakal pisah, 
Karo kowe selawase bakal bungah

Maturnuwun pun tansah mayungi pas udane teko
Ora ono sing iso ganteni kowe sing tak tresno

Roso sayang iki rabakal luntur sak enteke umur
Kowe rasah sumelang, sayang

Tresno iki tulus, marang sliramu wong bagus
Kowe rasah kuwatir, aku ora bakal muntir
Aku rabakal nglungani, duh pepujane ning ati
Matur gusti, iso dadi siji

Nyuwun gusti, bakale dadi siji

====================
====================
